retry_policy.completed_run: Only reconstruct a missing receipt or sync the preserved immutable offline W&B directory; never rerun or resume optimization.
retry_policy.partial_run: Close the entire attempt. A retry needs a fresh registration/state/claim and must rerun the whole 16-run attempt on one backend.
retry_policy.sealed_collection: Any partial or uncertain final collection spends the allocation and fails closed; never recollect a label.
